forecast-period.text: Partly cloudy. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending south to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]
Partly cloudy. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching 21 to 27.

Mostly sunny. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the morning then becoming southeast to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Mostly sunny. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the day then becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the early morning. Winds southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]
Mostly sunny. Winds south to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Mostly sunny. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then tending south to southeasterly during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Sunny. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Mostly clear. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h.
Partly cloudy. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]
Partly cloudy. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Mostly sunny. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Mostly sunny. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning southerly 20 to 30 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]
Partly cloudy. Winds southerly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Sunny. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Clear. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the south. Light winds becoming southerly 20 to 30 km/h in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Mostly sunny. The chance of fog in the south in the early morning. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to high 20s.

Sunny. The chance of morning fog in the south. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 25 km/h during the day then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to high 20s.

Sunny. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to high 20s.
Partly cloudy. Light winds.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm near the eastern border in the late afternoon and evening. Light winds becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then tending south to southeasterly in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower near the eastern border in the late morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon then becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.
Mostly sunny. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 14 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.
Sunny. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.
Partly cloudy. Light winds.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then tending south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]
Partly cloudy. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 14 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.

Sunny. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the north, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the early morning. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching 22 to 27.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Partly cloudy. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending east to southeasterly in the morning then tending south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds east to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h.

Cloudy. High chance of showers on and east of the ranges, medium chance elsewhere. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 16 and 20 with daytime temperatures reaching 21 to 27.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 9 [Very High]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower on and east of the ranges in the morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 16 and 20 with daytime temperatures reaching 23 to 28.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the morning and afternoon. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 15 and 19 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower north of Hawker in the morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending east to southeasterly during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 15 and 19 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h.

Cloudy. The chance of fog west of Nullarbor in the early morning. Slight chance of a shower in the morning and afternoon. Winds southerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:20am to 5:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 9 [Very High]

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower west of Nullarbor in the late morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to high 20s.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the morning then becoming southerly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Mostly sunny. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the morning then becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the early morning. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h turning southerly 20 to 30 km/h in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 18 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]
Partly cloudy. Winds south to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Mostly sunny. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 14 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the early morning. Winds southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:20am to 4:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]
Partly cloudy. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog near the west coast. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to high 20s.
Cloud clearing. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to high 20s.
Cloudy. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 15 and 19 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to high 20s.
No Rating
Sun protection 10:00am to 5:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 10 [Very High]

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h turning southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h in the late morning and early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 15 and 19 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower north of Coober Pedy in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 15 and 19 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower north of Marla, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 15 and 19 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Cloudy. Medium chance of rain east of Leigh Creek, near zero chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm, possibly severe with heavy rain which may lead to flash flooding north of Leigh Creek. Winds northeast to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h.

Cloudy. High chance of rain east of Leigh Creek, slight chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm, possibly severe with heavy rain which may lead to flash flooding in the far northeast in the morning and afternoon. Winds northeast to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h tending southeast to southwesterly 25 to 40 km/h before dawn. Overnight temperatures falling to between 18 and 23 with daytime temperatures reaching 23 to 28.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:50am to 4:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 9 [Very High]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southeast to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h becoming southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 18 and 22 with daytime temperatures reaching 25 to 30.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower north of Oodnadatta, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 17 and 22 with daytime temperatures reaching 27 to 32.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower about the Gammon Ranges in the morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 17 and 22 with daytime temperatures reaching 27 to 33.
